planned_actions: Catalog all breaking changes between v2 and v3 API
Write migration section for each breaking change with before/after code examples
Document rollback procedure for each migration step
Add estimated migration time per section
non_goals: Updating the v3 API reference itself
edge_cases: Breaking changes that affect both REST and WebSocket endpoints
Deprecated v2 endpoints with no direct v3 equivalent

known_risks: Migration time estimates are based on average codebase size and may vary
unverified_cases: Rollback procedure for batch endpoint migration has not been tested end-to-end
self_check.summary: All 7 breaking changes documented with before/after examples, rollback steps, and time estimates. Guide follows the established documentation template.

verdict.rationale: Migration guide covers all breaking changes with actionable steps. Reviewer concern about batch endpoint error handling is minor and tracked as debt.

closure.change_summary: Created comprehensive v2-to-v3 API migration guide covering 7 breaking changes with before/after examples and rollback procedures

reviews.summary: All breaking changes covered, examples are accurate

debt_items: Add error handling examples to batch endpoint migration section

what_went_well: Before/after code format made breaking changes immediately clear
Rollback procedures gave users confidence to start migration
memory_candidates: Migration guides should always include rollback procedures per section, not just a single rollback section
